notes: Concurrency fix: the fleet now runs as many jobs as your nodes' combined worker counts (2 nodes x3 = 6) instead of a flat cap of 4. Poison-job protection parks a file in Errored after 5 auto-requeues instead of looping forever. Each running job now reports which node is doing it. Node v2.12: Whisper cuBLAS/cuDNN fix + GUI startup diagnostics.
